scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:all: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/atlanta-tis run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/tis-api-server run build
